Notes: Erin Steuerwald hits 2 FTs with 1.1 seconds left in regulation for MBBC to tie
game and send it to OT. Dana Henrichs hits 3 ptr to start OT and Lakeland
trails in OT. Leah Eisner posts career highs of 22 points and 21 rebounds.
Lakeland hits 12 3-ptrs in game and outrebounds MBBC 55-40.

LastPlays.Narrative: 30 Stacie Ross IN; 31 Laci Peterson OUT
